name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A standard mutual NDA for two parties to share confidential information with each other under reciprocal confidentiality obligations.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: The cover page / order form template to accompany the Mutual NDA, capturing party names, signing details, and key commercial terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A standard agreement governing the provision of cloud-hosted software services, including subscription terms, acceptable use, data handling, and support obligations.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: A standard agreement for early-stage design partnerships, allowing a vendor to provide pre-release software to a design partner in exchange for feedback and collaboration.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: A standard SLA defining uptime commitments, incident response times, and remedies such as service credits for a cloud or software service.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: A standard agreement covering the delivery of professional or consulting services, including work orders, deliverables, payment terms, and intellectual property ownership.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A standard DPA governing the processing of personal data by a service provider on behalf of a customer, designed for GDPR and similar regulatory compliance.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A standard agreement for licensing software to end users or businesses, covering usage rights, restrictions, support, warranties, and liability.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A standard agreement establishing a commercial partnership between two companies, including roles, revenue sharing, intellectual property, and governance.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A standard agreement for a time-limited pilot or proof-of-concept engagement, allowing a customer to evaluate software or services before committing to a full contract.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A standard BAA for HIPAA compliance, governing how a business associate may use and safeguard protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: A standard addendum to be attached to a primary agreement, addressing AI-specific terms such as data use for model training, output ownership, and AI-related liability.
